errors.nameLength: Please enter your full name (2 to 99 characters).

cancel.refundEligible: This is more than 48 hours before the workshop, so you will receive a full refund.
cancel.refundLate: This is within 48 hours of the workshop. Per the cancellation policy, no refund will be issued, but the slot will be released.

cancel.cancelledMessage: Your booking has been cancelled. No refund per the >48h policy.
cancel.emailNote: A confirmation has been sent to your email.

errors.missingParams: This cancellation link is missing required information. Please use the link from your confirmation email.

errors.cancelFailed: Cancellation failed. Please try again or email palavarastudio@gmail.com.
